books.title: Sinusoidal Control of PMSM Motors with dsPIC30F (SVPWM Reference)
books.author: Texas Instruments
books.notes: Classic application note covering space vector PWM theory and sinusoidal commutation fundamentals for PMSM motors.

books.title: Field Oriented Control of Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motors
books.author: Texas Instruments
books.notes: Core FOC reference: Clarke/Park transforms, current control loops, and PI tuning guidance for PMSM drives.

books.title: InstaSPIN-FOC and InstaSPIN-MOTION User's Guide
books.author: Texas Instruments
books.notes: Sensorless FOC overview built around TI's FAST estimator (flux, angle, speed, torque) for self-tuning motor control.

books.title: AN1078: Sensorless Field Oriented Control of a PMSM
books.author: Microchip Technology
books.notes: Sliding mode observer based sensorless FOC implementation with dsPIC reference firmware structure.

books.title: STM32 PMSM FOC SDK / Motor Control Firmware Library (UM1052)
books.author: STMicroelectronics
books.notes: User manual for ST's motor control firmware library covering FOC state machine, workbench tooling, and project configuration.

books.title: Direct Torque Control: Theory and Implementation Basics
books.author: MathWorks
books.notes: Introductory tutorial on Direct Torque Control concepts, switching tables, and hysteresis comparators.

books.title: CMSIS-NN: Efficient Neural Network Kernels for Arm Cortex-M
books.author: Arm Software
books.notes: Reference documentation for CMSIS-NN kernels used to accelerate quantized neural network inference on Cortex-M MCUs.

books.title: TensorFlow Lite for Microcontrollers Documentation
books.author: Google
books.notes: Official docs for deploying TFLite Micro models on resource-constrained microcontrollers, including memory planning.

books.title: MISRA C:2012 Guidelines Overview
books.author: MISRA Consortium
books.notes: Landing page for the MISRA C coding guideline set used widely in automotive and safety-critical embedded software.

books.title: FreeRTOS Kernel Developer Documentation
books.author: Amazon Web Services
books.notes: Reference guide and free e-book covering FreeRTOS task scheduling, queues, semaphores, and memory management.

books.title: Implementing Space Vector Modulation with Overmodulation
books.author: Texas Instruments
books.notes: Detailed treatment of SVPWM sector identification and overmodulation strategies for three-phase inverters.

books.title: ISO 26262: Road Vehicles Functional Safety (Standard Overview)
books.author: International Organization for Standardization
books.notes: Official ISO landing page describing the scope and structure of the ISO 26262 functional safety standard for road vehicles.

books.title: CAN Knowledge Base — CAN in Automation (CiA)
books.author: CAN in Automation
books.notes: Comprehensive knowledge base covering CAN, CAN FD, and CAN XL frame formats, bit timing, error handling, and physical layer — maintained by the official CAN standardisation body.

books.title: CANopen Application Layer & Communication Profile (CiA 301)
books.author: CAN in Automation
books.notes: Landing page for the CANopen application layer specification — object dictionary, PDO/SDO communication, NMT state machine, LSS protocol, and device profiles.

books.title: CAN Bus Technology Overview — Vector Know-How
books.author: Vector Informatik
books.notes: Vector's CAN technology series covering frame types, error frames, overload frames, CAN FD speed modes, CAN XL, and practical bus topology guidelines.

books.title: LIN Bus Overview — CAN in Automation (CiA)
books.author: CAN in Automation
books.notes: Overview of the LIN protocol — single-wire master/slave bus, break field detection, frame structure, scheduler tables, and automotive body electronics use cases.

books.title: LIN Specification Package 2.2A
books.author: LIN Consortium / CiA
books.notes: Official LIN 2.2A specification — physical layer, data link layer, transport layer, diagnostic frames, and LIN description file (LDF) format.

books.title: Modbus Protocol Specifications — Modbus.org
books.author: Modbus Organization
books.notes: Free official Modbus RTU, ASCII, and TCP/IP specification PDFs — function codes, register maps, exception codes, and framing. Essential for industrial embedded field devices.

books.title: UM10204: I²C-bus Specification and User Manual
books.author: NXP Semiconductors
books.notes: Definitive I²C specification from NXP — standard/fast/fast-plus/high-speed/ultra-fast modes, bus arbitration, multi-master operation, clock stretching, and 10-bit addressing.

books.title: AUTOSAR Classic Platform Standards
books.author: AUTOSAR Consortium
books.notes: AUTOSAR Classic Platform specification set — layered BSW architecture, OS, Com/Mem/Diag modules, RTE generation, SWC interfaces, and ARXML tool exchange format.

books.title: AUTOSAR Adaptive Platform Standards
books.author: AUTOSAR Consortium
books.notes: AUTOSAR Adaptive Platform for high-compute ECUs — service-oriented architecture (SOME/IP, DDS), POSIX OS, Execution Manager, Update & Config Mgmt, and cybersecurity.

books.title: Automotive SPICE Process Assessment Model (PAM)
books.author: VDA QMC
books.notes: Official Automotive SPICE landing page — process assessment model for automotive software development covering engineering, supporting, and management processes up to CL3.

books.title: intacs — Automotive SPICE Assessor Qualification
books.author: intacs
books.notes: Official intacs qualification scheme for ASPICE assessors — competence profiles (Provisional, Competent, Principal Assessor), self-assessment worksheets, and exam preparation resources.

books.title: Basic Calculation of a Buck Converter's Power Stage (SLVA477)
books.author: Texas Instruments
books.notes: Step-by-step power stage calculations for a synchronous buck converter — inductor value, output/input capacitor sizing, switch selection, and loop bandwidth guidelines.

books.title: Gate Driver Overview & Design Resources — Texas Instruments
books.author: Texas Instruments
books.notes: TI's gate driver technology overview — isolated/non-isolated topologies, bootstrap drivers, propagation delay, Miller clamp, and cross-conduction prevention for WBG devices.

books.title: Field-Oriented Control (FOC) — MathWorks Motor Control Blockset
books.author: MathWorks
books.notes: MathWorks Motor Control Blockset guide for FOC design — Clarke/Park transforms, current loop PID tuning, MTPA, flux weakening, and automatic C code generation for embedded targets.

books.title: TI MotorControl SDK — C2000 Motor Control Software
books.author: Texas Instruments
books.notes: TI's C2000 MotorControl SDK providing optimised FOC libraries, sensorless estimators, hardware abstraction, and reference designs for PMSM and BLDC motor drives.

books.title: LangChain Python Documentation
books.author: LangChain Inc.
books.notes: Official Python docs for LangChain — building LLM applications with chains, retrieval-augmented generation, tool-using agents, memory, and streaming responses.

books.title: LlamaIndex Documentation — Data Framework for LLMs
books.author: LlamaIndex Inc.
books.notes: Framework for connecting custom data sources to LLMs — document loaders, vector/keyword indices, sub-question decomposition, agentic pipelines, and multi-modal RAG.

books.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Large Language Models: A Survey
books.author: Yunfan Gao et al.
books.notes: Seminal survey of RAG architectures — naive, advanced, and modular RAG. Covers indexing pipelines, chunking strategies, dense/sparse retrieval, reranking, and evaluation benchmarks.

books.title: HuggingFace NLP Course
books.author: HuggingFace
books.notes: Free in-depth course on the HuggingFace Transformers library — tokenizers, fine-tuning pre-trained models, sequence classification, NER, question answering, and text generation.

books.title: Practical Deep Learning for Coders — fast.ai
books.author: Jeremy Howard, Sylvain Gugger
books.notes: Top-down practical deep learning course — vision models, NLP, tabular data, collaborative filtering, model deployment, and writing models from scratch in fastai/PyTorch.

books.title: Scikit-learn User Guide
books.author: Scikit-learn Developers
books.notes: Comprehensive scikit-learn reference — supervised/unsupervised algorithms, preprocessing pipelines, cross-validation, hyperparameter search, and model evaluation metrics.

books.title: MLflow Documentation — ML Lifecycle Management
books.author: MLflow Community
books.notes: Open-source ML lifecycle platform — experiment tracking with runs/metrics/params, model packaging in MLmodel format, model registry, and deployment to REST endpoints.

books.title: Prompt Engineering Guide — DAIR.AI
books.author: DAIR.AI
books.notes: Comprehensive prompt engineering guide — zero/few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought, self-consistency, tree-of-thought, ReAct, and automated prompt optimisation techniques.

books.title: LangGraph Documentation — Stateful AI Agents
books.author: LangChain Inc.
books.notes: LangGraph framework for stateful multi-step AI agents — cyclic computation graphs, conditional edges, human-in-the-loop checkpointing, and multi-agent coordination.

books.title: MongoDB Manual — Official Documentation
books.author: MongoDB Inc.
books.notes: Official MongoDB reference — BSON document model, CRUD, aggregation pipeline, indexing strategies, transactions, replication, sharding, and Atlas Vector Search for RAG workloads.

books.title: Azure SQL Documentation
books.author: Microsoft
books.notes: Azure SQL family docs — SQL Database, Managed Instance, SQL on VMs. Covers elastic pools, Always Encrypted, read replicas, DTU vs vCore models, and query performance insights.

books.title: SQLite Documentation
books.author: D. Richard Hipp et al.
books.notes: SQLite documentation — the most widely deployed database engine. Serverless, zero-configuration, single-file ACID database widely used in embedded systems, IoT devices, and mobile apps.

books.title: Azure Cosmos DB Documentation
books.author: Microsoft
books.notes: Globally distributed multi-model database on Azure — SQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, Gremlin, and Table APIs; configurable consistency levels; built-in vector search for RAG workloads.

books.title: Redis Documentation — In-Memory Data Platform
books.author: Redis Ltd.
books.notes: Redis documentation — data structures, persistence modes, Cluster, Sentinel, pub/sub, streams, and Redis Stack vector search for semantic caching and RAG pipelines.

books.title: Azure Functions Documentation — Serverless
books.author: Microsoft
books.notes: Azure Functions — event-driven serverless compute with HTTP, timer, queue, Blob, and EventHub triggers. Includes Durable Functions for orchestration, fan-out/fan-in, and human interaction patterns.

books.title: AWS Lambda Developer Guide
books.author: Amazon Web Services
books.notes: AWS Lambda guide — function configuration, event source mappings, execution environments, concurrency controls, Lambda Layers, container images, and cold start optimisation.

books.title: Microservices — Martin Fowler & James Lewis
books.author: Martin Fowler, James Lewis
books.notes: The seminal microservices article — service decomposition around business capabilities, decentralised data management, design for failure, smart endpoints/dumb pipes, and evolutionary design.

books.title: The Twelve-Factor App
books.author: Adam Wiggins
books.notes: Methodology for building scalable cloud-native SaaS — stateless processes, externalized config, disposable containers, dev/prod parity, and treating logs as event streams.

books.title: Azure Architecture Center — Cloud Design Patterns
books.author: Microsoft
books.notes: Microsoft's cloud architecture reference — design patterns (CQRS, Saga, Strangler Fig, Circuit Breaker), reference architectures for serverless, microservices, and AI workloads on Azure.

books.title: TinyML Foundation — Resources & Research
books.author: TinyML Foundation
books.notes: Hub for the TinyML community — keynote talks, research papers, open benchmarks (MLPerf Tiny), and resources for deploying machine learning on microcontrollers and edge devices.

books.title: Edge Impulse Documentation — Embedded ML Platform
books.author: Edge Impulse Inc.
books.notes: End-to-end embedded ML platform — data collection, DSP feature extraction, EON neural architecture search, model profiling, and deployment to STM32, Arduino, Nordic, and Raspberry Pi targets.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.author: Jane Austen
books.notes: Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy's slow-burning romance — one of the greatest novels in English literature, sharp on class, wit, and the art of first impressions.

books.title: Dracula
books.author: Bram Stoker
books.notes: The definitive vampire novel told through journals, letters, and newspaper clippings — atmospheric Victorian horror that invented a genre.

books.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.notes: The first short-story collection featuring Holmes and Watson — twelve cases including A Scandal in Bohemia and The Red-Headed League.

books.title: Meditations
books.author: Marcus Aurelius
books.notes: The private journals of a Roman emperor — 12 books of Stoic philosophy on duty, resilience, impermanence, and the examined life. Still read by engineers, leaders, and athletes.

books.title: The Art of War
books.author: Sun Tzu
books.notes: 13 chapters on strategy, intelligence, and adaptability — the most translated strategy text in history. Widely applied to business, engineering decisions, and project management.

books.title: Common Sense
books.author: Thomas Paine
books.notes: The 47-page pamphlet that helped ignite the American Revolution — a model of clear, forceful persuasive writing accessible to any reader.

books.title: The Autobiography of Benjamin Franklin
books.author: Benjamin Franklin
books.notes: Franklin's own account of his life — from candle-maker's son to printer, inventor, scientist, and statesman. Famous for the 13 Virtues self-improvement framework.

books.title: Up from Slavery
books.author: Booker T. Washington
books.notes: Washington's autobiography tracing his journey from slavery to founding the Tuskegee Institute — a story of education, self-reliance, and practical progress.

books.title: The Story of My Life
books.author: Helen Keller
books.notes: Helen Keller's memoir of growing up deaf-blind — her discovery of language through Anne Sullivan and her journey to college. One of the most inspiring autobiographies ever written.

books.title: As a Man Thinketh
books.author: James Allen
books.notes: A short classic (under 30 pages) on the power of thought to shape character and circumstance. One of the earliest and most influential self-help books.

books.title: The Prophet
books.author: Kahlil Gibran
books.notes: 26 prose-poems on love, work, joy, sorrow, children, and freedom — Gibran's masterpiece of philosophical poetry. One of the best-selling books of the 20th century.

books.title: Self-Reliance
books.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
books.notes: Emerson's most famous essay — a call to trust your own instincts and resist social conformity. Contains the line: 'A foolish consistency is the hobgoblin of little minds.'
